scripts.sentry:sourcemaps: sentry-cli releases new "${SENTRY_RELEASE:-${VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA:-dev}}" && sentry-cli sourcemaps inject --release "${SENTRY_RELEASE:-${VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA:-dev}}" .next && sentry-cli sourcemaps upload --release "${SENTRY_RELEASE:-${VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA:-dev}}" .next && sentry-cli releases set-commits "${SENTRY_RELEASE:-${VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA:-dev}}" --auto --ignore-missing && sentry-cli releases finalize "${SENTRY_RELEASE:-${VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA:-dev}}" && sentry-cli deploys new --release "${SENTRY_RELEASE:-${VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA:-dev}}" --env "${VERCEL_ENV:-production}" && find .next -name '*.map' -type f -delete
